children.name: HomePlayNote
children.text: Collect 24 honey drops and clear 18 jelly tiles.

children.name: HomeEventSectionBody
children.text: Short-session events and streak rewards designed for casual portrait play.

children.name: HomeDailyStreakBody
children.text: Finish one stage to unlock a rainbow rocket and 30 bonus coins.

children.name: HomeTreasureCruiseBody
children.text: Chain five win streaks to fill the picnic map and claim a golden chest.

children.name: HomeJourneyBody
children.text: You are one win away from the orchard gate. Keep your boosters for the honey lane.

children.name: HomeGoalCardBody
children.text: Use fewer than 20 moves to keep the streak chest alive.

children.name: HomeClubCardBody
children.text: Two more wins this week unlock the shared blossom chest.

children.name: LoadingBody
children.text: Packing boosters, goals, and orchard surprises for your next run.

children.name: LoadingLevelCardBody
children.text: Collect honey drops and clear the jelly lane.

children.name: LoadingMascotText
children.text: Poppy is setting the meadow board.

children.name: LoadingProgressBody
children.text: Preloading stage goals, booster inventory, and combo popups.

children.name: LoadingTargetPreviewBody
children.text: Watch the honey lanes and save rockets for the lower right corner.

children.name: LoadingTipBody
children.text: A rocket plus hammer combo is the safest answer when honey crates block the final drop lane.

children.name: GameplayStageBody
children.text: Collect honey drops and clear the jelly lane before moves run out.

children.name: GameplayGoalSummaryBody
children.text: The jelly lane is concentrated on the lower right. Save your rocket for the final corner after the honey column opens.
